returns._0: escrowId The ID of the created escrow

params._releaseToSeller: If true, release to seller; if false, refund buyer

createEscrow(address,address,uint256).notice: Create a new escrow (called by Marketplace contract)

emergencyWithdraw(address,uint256).notice: Emergency withdrawal (only owner, for stuck funds)

getBuyerEscrows(address).notice: Get all escrows for a buyer

getDisputeTimeRemaining(uint256).notice: Get time remaining in dispute window

getSellerEscrows(address).notice: Get all escrows for a seller

isDisputeWindowOpen(uint256).notice: Check if dispute window is still open

raiseDispute(uint256).notice: Raise a dispute (buyer or seller can raise within dispute window)

refund(uint256).notice: Refund buyer (called by seller cancellation or dispute resolution)

releasePayment(uint256).notice: Release payment to seller (called by buyer confirming receipt)
